violations.text: Old rodent droppings were observed on the left side of the exit door in the back storage room. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2026

The floor in the back storage area has an accumulation of miscellaneous debris and old rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2024

The shelving in the pet food area area (dog/bird food) has an accumulation of old rodent droppings and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2023
